summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutations are recommended. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined with route_security; one PR needs human review because ClawSweeper/Codex review did not complete.
